creator: p+freebsd@krvtz.net
text:
I would like to take over maintenance of mail/nullmailer. Per package installation notice it's currently missing a maintainer:

> The nullmailer port currently does not have a maintainer. As a result, it is
more likely to have unresolved issues, not be up-to-date, or even be removed in
the future. To volunteer to maintain this port, please create an issue at:
